title: Full Functionality Pivot Table App
excerpt:

posts.author: greg-hrc (Greg Collette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there an app on the marketplace that can do pivot tables close to the level of Excel or Google Sheets?

monday’s built-in pivot table widgets (side note: I’m not sure why there are two) are not only clunky from a UX perspective and don’t allow for multi-dimensional sorting and formulas, but their formatted date feature doesn’t work properly (e.g. item on the first of the month is being attributed to the previous month), which is our main need/use case.

Would love to be able to use a truly functional pivot table widget to organize and sum our boards, but on a first pass of the marketplace, nothing jumped out as providing that widget/view.
